The '''''Corusca Rainbow''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Uwlla Iillor]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was originally called the '''''Black Asp''''' and served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

In [[6 ABY/Legends|6.5 ABY]] it was part of the force assigned to [[Rachuk sector/Legends|Rachuk sector]] under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Devlia]]. She participated in a skirmish with [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in the [[Chorax system/Legends|Chorax system]] while attempting to capture the ''[[Pulsar Skate]]''. [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Potin]] was an officer at this time.

The ''Black Asp''{{'s}} [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]] dragged the squadron out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] en route to [[Talasea]]. Unfortunately for the ''Asp'', the Rogues were able to force her retreat.

Following the [[Second Battle of Borleias|loss of Borleias]], Captain Iillor led the ''Black Asp'' in a defection to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Renamed ''Corusca Rainbow'', the ship and its crew were given a vital role in the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|siege of Coruscant]]. The ''Corusca Rainbow'' was to exit at the edge of the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]] before the main fleet to determine if Rogue Squadron had successfully downed Coruscant's [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shields]]. If it detected no [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], it would allow the fleet to exit directly above Coruscant; if the shields were intact, it would activate its gravity well generators to pull the fleet from hyperspace and avoid its defenses. Rogue Squadron brought the shields down at the last minute, allowing the ''Rainbow'' just enough time to power down the generators and join the fight.

Early in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the ''Corusca Rainbow'' was assigned to the defense of [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]]. Admiral [[Traest Kre'fey]] moved the ship to the New Republic fleet gathered at [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]] and used it to prevent the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] ships from leaving after they devastated that world.
